subcodes.first_line: O thou sorrowing branch of the Blessed Tree! In these days be thou neither disconsolate nor grief-stricken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المتکدر من السدره المبارکه فی هذه الایام فلاتبتئس و لاتحزن من
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
